sql_array: CREATE TABLE business_entities (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), details JSON, creation_date TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO business_entities (id, name, details, creation_date) VALUES (1, 'Entity A', '{"extraInfo": "Data"}', '2023-01-01 00:00:00');
INSERT INTO business_entities (id, name, details, creation_date) VALUES (2, 'Entity B', '{"extraInfo": "Data with NULL", "valid": NULL}', '2023-01-02 00:00:00');
INSERT INTO business_entities (id, name, details, creation_date) VALUES (3, 'Entity C', '{}', NULL);
SELECT uddi_get_businessDetailExt(name) AS business_info, json_array_length(details) AS detail_length FROM business_entities WHERE creation_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY detail_length DESC;

SELECT id, name, (SELECT json_array_length(details) FROM business_entities AS b WHERE b.id = business_entities.id) AS json_details_length FROM business_entities WHERE details IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING json_details_length > 0;
SELECT uddi_get_businessDetailExt(name) AS business_info FROM business_entities WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM business_entities WHERE details IS NULL);
SELECT id, name, json_array_length(details) AS detail_length FROM business_entities WHERE detail_length = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 0, 'Missing Info', 0;

SELECT uddi_get_businessDetailExt(name) AS business_data, json_array_length(details) AS details_count FROM (SELECT id, name, details FROM business_entities WHERE id = 1) AS derived_table WHERE details_count > 0 ORDER BY details_count;
SELECT id, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(255)) AS temp_name, json_array_length(details) FROM business_entities WHERE details IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE business_entities ADD COLUMN contact_info JSON;
INSERT INTO business_entities (id, name, details, creation_date, contact_info) VALUES (4, 'Entity D', '{"contact": {"email": "test@example.com"}}', '2023-01-03 00:00:00', '{"phone": "1234567890"}');
